+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",

+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "lima: Stuck network when using multiple connections with k3s",
+    "description": "Stuck network when using multiple connections with k3s. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify lima troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your lima installation:\n```bash\nlimactl --version\nlimactl list\n```\nLook for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review lima configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant lima configuration:\nWhen running a non-trivial web app in a Lima VM using the `k3s` template, the network stops being responsive. This seems to happen when multiple persistent HTTP connections are established."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Stuck network when using multiple connections with k3s",
+        "description": "I had some problems initially to reproduce it; I was opening lots of tabs with `http://localhost:31833` quickly, and they all worked. But when I waited a bit between opening tabs, I would eventually see the failure.\n\nThe corresponding error in the hostagent log is:\n\n```json\n{\"error\":\"close tcp 127.0.0.1:6443-\\u003e127.0.0.1:55606: shutdown: socket is not connected\",\"level\":\"debug\",\"msg\":\"failed to call CloseRead\",\"time\":\"2025-06-03T10:18:56-07:00\"}\n```\n\nIt seems to be a problem with the GRPC\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Stuck network when using multiple connections… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest lima to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I had some problems initially to reproduce it; I was opening lots of tabs with `http://localhost:31833` quickly, and they all worked. But when I waited a bit between opening tabs, I would eventually see the failure.",
